branding.title: Speech synthesis demo
branding.subtitleHtml: Voice preset selects the reference clip for intonation and timbre. Script names are dialogue labels only.

copy.singleLineHint: Pick a voice preset and type any sentence — fastest way to test dots.TTS.
copy.singleLineDefaultText: This is dots.TTS on our GPU server — natural speech with cloned intonation.
copy.dialogueCalloutHtml: Showcase scene. Each line can use a different voice preset. Edit the script, then press Run scene.

tooltips.settings_overview: These controls affect every Generate / Run on this page. Voice preset picks the reference clip; sliders tune how {{engine}} generates speech.
tooltips.spoken_text: Text that {{engine}} will speak using the selected voice preset.
tooltips.generation_params: Fine-tune how {{engine}} generates audio — affects every run until you change them.
